horoscope: Conversations early today tend to be intense rather than light, dear Aries. While you shouldn't avoid important topics altogether, it's best to be as aboveboard as possible and back out of anything that looks or feels off. There is good energy for doing something creative, however. A Venus-Uranus sextile brings fresh energy, and it’s the kind that encourages you to let go of some of your inhibitions so that you can enjoy yourself more fully. It can be a time to improve situations, relationships, attitudes, and projects through a spirit of openness. With increased freedom and respect, relationships flourish. You can be in a position to let go of dysfunctional behaviors, particularly regarding your approach to rest, recovery, avoidance, and habits, with comfort and security. You can be motivated to move forward on something that has been stuck or is weighing down your spirit. Business or money matters can also benefit from novel or fresh approaches.

Early today, aim to avoid stirring up controversy with a combative or mistrusting communication style, dear Taurus, which can put others on the defensive. A Mercury-Pluto aspect makes it all too easy to do so. However, you can do some important digging, whether this is in your own psyche or some form of research, and become completely absorbed in what you're doing. Still, energies shape up to be quite freeing shortly into the day. Inviting energy is with you for all things social, romantic, and creative, and themes of openness, adventure, and progress improve your mood and outlook. Venus in your social sector harmonizes with Uranus in your sign, and you can enjoy a boost to your social life. It's a time of innovative ideas, dreams, and a strong sense of possibilities. There can be opportunities to mingle with someone special or a spark of excitement and strong motivation to make changes to your life, particularly with people and projects that inspire you. There can be a fun element of surprise to the day’s energies, and you can be attracted to new-fangled things or ideas.

If you're feeling skeptical early today, dear Gemini, take more time to observe before sharing your doubts with others. Temporarily, your mind can exaggerate the negative. Avoid overthinking things today, unless you're enjoying the process or the topic. Shortly into the day, however, a Venus-Uranus transit boosts you. You can feel as if a weight has lifted with this transit encouraging you to let go of heavy energies. An opportunity to draw upon your inner wisdom to solve a problem can emerge. You’re bringing unique insight to what you’re doing, and others are taking note! You're more idealistic than practical at the moment, and it suits you well today. You have a good sense for future trends, enabling inventive, timely ideas and solutions. It can be a fine day for business efforts, particularly those involving promotion, but wait for finalizing things due to Mercury's current retrograde.

Watch for a tendency to dwell on problem areas early today, dear Cancer. Helping you with this is today's Venus-Uranus transit, as people around you seem willing to move past problems. Experimenting with ideas can bring you opportunities, and so can networking. It can be a good idea to do a bit of mingling if it doesn’t already come naturally to you today. A new or improved connection is possible. You’re likely to connect with others who inspire you mentally or with topics and information that similarly motivate you. In turn, others are attracted to your uniqueness and ideas. Intellectual exchanges are not only enjoyable but can also be quite fruitful or even mind-expanding. The day helps bring a sense of renewal or refreshment to your relationships.

Early today, you could encounter double-talk or other manipulative methods, dear Leo, but as long as you don't absorb others' tension, and focus instead on what you want or need to accomplish, you're in good shape. Today's Venus-Uranus transit lightens the mood. Freedom from an obligation can figure strongly, or discovering a new way to approach a nagging problem is exciting. With this influence, you’re in a good position to improve a relationship or even to have a social breakthrough. There can be a happy, intimate connection, a financial advance, or a workplace improvement that puts you in a fine mood now. People might see and appreciate you for your unique input. It’s a good time to solve problems, not necessarily through great effort or focus, but through a general willingness to let things go and put things behind you. With this transit, you and others are embracing new attitudes. Take advantage of this to overcome frustration or insecurity and try something new.

Early today, there is a tendency to probe a little too much for your own good, dear Virgo. Letting go just a little may be better for you now, and helping you with this is a Venus-Uranus transit. With Venus in your solar seventh house, taking a special someone's viewpoint into account can be especially rewarding these days. Today, with Venus in harmony with Uranus, there can be a spirit of growth, progress, or advancement in a relationship or with feelings about your relationship status. It’s a promising time to consult with someone special or to brainstorm to come up with inspiring ideas. What emerges in a partnership or friendship today can be very productive, or at the least, you feel you can move past problems. It's a good time for connecting with others who inspire you mentally or for a mind-expanding experience. Relationships are revitalized and refreshed with an open approach to one another. You may be attracted to someone with a fascinating mind, or you’re drawing people to you who appreciate your unique way of thinking. Instead, one-on-one relationships provide motivating and stimulating experiences. This is about embracing new ways of doing things, especially new ways to relate and interact.

Early today, aim to avoid negative lines of communicating and thinking, dear Libra, which can quickly spiral with retrograde Mercury in a minor tense aspect with intense Pluto. However, the day quickly becomes lighter. Venus, your planetary ruler, harmonizes with Uranus, putting you in an ideal position to enjoy yourself. You can bring a positive approach to practical matters today, and there can be clear benefits involved. Solutions to problems are unlikely to be traditional ones with this transit in play, or they don’t come about in the usual way, so it makes sense to keep your mind open to possibilities. Pursuing your daily routines or work generates positive vibes and, quite possibly, social opportunities. You may discover exciting alternative methods for health, nutrition, or fitness. Doing things differently can open doors and improve your mood and concentration.

While disagreements are possible early today, dear Scorpio, if you clear these up and work on resolving problem areas while avoiding overextending yourself, you'll be in a better position to benefit from today's Venus-Uranus transit. This influence inspires a cheerful spirit of growth that feels great. Others gravitate to your more unique qualities or creations, which you’re happy to share. You're breaking out of an old pattern, and new approaches to people and projects bring rewards. In a relationship, you can symbolically break the chains that have bound you to past restrictive behaviors. Life feels new and fresh, and there can be lively exchanges with a love interest or friend. You can turn around almost any problem or boring situation, and a surprise invite could figure strongly.

Early today, suspicion or skepticism can threaten to interfere with the good vibes, dear Sagittarius. You may be better off analyzing things, not people, right now! There may be a tendency for certain others to misunderstand some of the things you say, so strive to be as clear as possible. Clearing this up can help you enjoy today's Venus-Uranus transit, which is quite liberating. With it, an open and forthcoming approach with others can work in your favor, and this may be especially the case with family or people with whom you live or share close quarters. Venus is currently transiting your home-and-family sector, and today, it harmonizes with Uranus, opening up your approach, methods, and mind to new ways of getting along and enjoying yourself. Your thinking is forward-looking and confident, and you can approach domestic matters and routines or work in a new and improved way. Alternative methods or approaches to health and wellness deserve your attention now. On the home front, you can be in the mood to change things up. This transit is also helpful for moving past grudges, insecurities, and resentment.

A minor challenging Mercury-Pluto aspect early today tends to pull up a skeptical or even paranoid mindset, dear Capricorn, but it's temporary and controllable. Interactions can be intense, and it makes sense to avoid suspicion and negativity. Helping you with this is a Venus-Uranus transit that encourages a lighter, fresher perspective after heavy energy. This transit opens up channels for pleasure and enjoyment. This is a good time for romantic matters, learning, and connecting. You feel freer and more spontaneous as you interact with others, and there can be interesting things to learn from a sibling, classmate, child, or friend. Learning endeavors can be particularly fulfilling and mind-opening. Updated technology or new gadgetry can open up a new channel of communication for you. News from a love interest could be pleasantly unexpected.

There's some tendency to second-guess things early today, dear Aquarius, but aim to sidestep mind games. Aim to pour this energy into a special project, cause, or study. Fortunately, a Venus-Uranus transit takes over today, and it's a pleasant, liberating energy. It can be a good time for home improvement, discovering new interests, or reawakening a past interest that you now have the time or tools to explore. With this transit, you're a little more daring and willing to experiment, particularly with your practical, business, and financial affairs that can certainly use some fresh thinking and may benefit from a fresh perspective. With openness to new ways of doing the routine, you can have some fun and make progress today. It's a fine day for personal appeal, too, with lovely Venus in contact with your planetary ruler. Mercury's retrograde requires some sensitivity, but things are certainly looking up.

Early today, aim to be a little more alert to the words you choose to express yourself, dear Pisces, as you may be stirring up a bit of controversy without knowing it. Try not to absorb any negativity around you and focus on your own projects and goals. Fortunately, today's Venus-Uranus transit feels lighter, and this energy is most welcome. This influence boosts your popularity and your mood. Using the power of words to attract what you want or to further your interests can work well for you now, although it should be said that Mercury's retrograde requires some sensitivity. There can be minor social blunders or mild misunderstandings to sort through, but overall, you're hopeful. You might not know where you're heading just yet, but you have a sense that it's the right direction.
